canonical_definition: The task of searching for and retrieving relevant code snippets from a large codebase based on a query.
papers: CoRNStack: High-Quality Contrastive Data for Better Code Retrieval and Reranking
MMTEB: Massive Multilingual Text Embedding Benchmark

definitions.text: The task of searching for and retrieving relevant code snippets from a large codebase based on a query.
definitions.paper: CoRNStack: High-Quality Contrastive Data for Better Code Retrieval and Reranking

definitions.text: A semantic search task where natural language queries are used to retrieve relevant code snippets.
definitions.paper: CoRNStack: High-Quality Contrastive Data for Better Code Retrieval and Reranking

definitions.text: The task of retrieving relevant natural language descriptions or documents based on a code snippet query.
definitions.paper: CoRNStack: High-Quality Contrastive Data for Better Code Retrieval and Reranking

definitions.text: The task of retrieving relevant code snippets based on another code snippet as a query.

relationships.paper: CoRNStack: High-Quality Contrastive Data for Better Code Retrieval and Reranking
relationships.evidence: First, we consider CodeSearchNet (CSN) (Husain et al., 2019) and AdvTest (Lu et al., 2021) as benchmarks for function-level text-to-code retrieval, a semantic search task where natural language queries are used to retrieve relevant code snippets. (Section 4.1.1)
